description: Refactor the existing 5 Victorian university scripts into a single UniversalEngine. Create a migration for a site_configs table in Supabase that stores jsonb extraction maps (CSS selectors + Text Anchors). Implement a 'Visual Anchor' logic in Python where the engine searches for text labels like 'ATAR' or 'Fees' if the primary CSS selector fails. The engine should output a 'confidence score' to Supabase for the annual audit. Note that the Latrobe scraper has not been properly validated and still needs some additional work.
